macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin sinks below $73,000 amid geopolitical shock and liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to around $72,912 after U.S. strikes on an Iranian military site near Hormuz, with nearly $958 million in liquidations reported. The move marked one of the sharpest risk-off sessions in 2026 and hit broader crypto sentiment. [2]

items.title: Crypto market falls to multi-week lows as ETF outflows mount
items.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum both dropped to their lowest levels in more than six weeks, with traders losing over $900 million in the past 24 hours. Market weakness was linked to heavy Bitcoin ETF outflows and broader macro pressure. [3][4]

items.title: Solana tests major Alpenglow upgrade aimed at near-instant finality
items.summary: Solana is testing Alpenglow, its most significant consensus change since launch, replacing Proof of History and TowerBFT with Votor and Rotor. The upgrade targets 100 to 150 millisecond finality and is slated for mainnet rollout later in 2026 after strong validator support. [1]

items.title: Solana ETF inflows continue despite broader crypto weakness
items.summary: Spot Solana ETFs recorded net inflows of $15.6 million in one recent week, even as Bitcoin and Ethereum funds saw large outflows. Fidelity and Bitwise products reportedly led activity, highlighting continued institutional interest in SOL. [1]

items.title: Solana ecosystem sees enterprise and payments expansion
items.summary: The Solana Foundation launched a Google Cloud effort to connect autonomous agents with enterprise payment systems, while SoFi announced its SoFiUSD stablecoin on Solana and Ethereum. These developments point to rising use of Solana for settlement, merchant payments, and tokenized deposits. [1]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Microsoft announces Azure Linux 4.0, its first general-purpose server Linux distribution
items.summary: Microsoft introduced Azure Linux 4.0, expanding its Linux offerings with a general-purpose server distribution aimed at cloud and infrastructure workloads. The move highlights continued competition in enterprise cloud platforms and operating-system tooling.

items.title: Snowflake commits $6 billion to AWS over five years
items.summary: Snowflake said it will spend $6 billion on AWS over five years, with Graviton chips at the center of the agreement. The deal underscores the deepening dependence of major data-platform companies on hyperscale cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Roku rolls out a new home screen experience
items.summary: Roku is pushing a significant update to its home screen, changing how users navigate content and access apps. The redesign is one of the most visible consumer-tech product changes in the last day.

items.title: Walmart launches a budget outdoor camera with Google Home integration
items.summary: Walmart introduced an affordable outdoor security camera that works with Google Home, broadening the retailer’s smart-home hardware lineup. The launch adds another low-cost option in the connected-home market.

items.title: Steam Deck OLED sees a sharp price increase amid RAM shortages
items.summary: The Steam Deck OLED’s price has risen significantly as RAM shortages continue to affect hardware supply chains. The increase points to ongoing component pressure in consumer electronics.

items.title: Spotify adds podcast clip sharing and saving features
items.summary: Spotify updated its app to let users save or share podcast clips as links, reviving a clip-sharing format for audio content. The feature is another step in improving content discovery and social sharing on the platform.
